title: Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services family as a Full Stack Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
